description: Methods that encode a complete scan or submap into a descriptor used for candidate place retrieval.
exclude: methods used only for local registration after retrieval
name: Global Descriptor

description: Global descriptors constructed by deterministic geometric, projection, histogram, or signal-processing rules.
name: Handcrafted

description: Handcrafted global descriptors derived from bird's-eye-view or polar BEV representations.
name: BEV

description: Handcrafted descriptors based on spatial bins, histograms, signatures, or discrete scan partitions.
name: Discretization

description: Handcrafted descriptors using Fourier, Radon, sinogram, or related transform-domain representations.
exclude: ordinary spatial histogram without transform-domain matching
name: Frequency / Transform Domain

description: Handcrafted global descriptors built from point sets, stable primitives, graphs, contours, triangles, or other explicit structures.
name: Point / Structural

description: Global scan or submap descriptors learned from data for retrieval or loop-closure classification.
exclude: handcrafted descriptor followed only by a learned threshold
name: Learning

description: Learned global descriptors based primarily on voxels, sparse convolutions, or other 3D discretizations.
name: Voxel / Sparse Discretization

description: Learned place descriptors that fuse LiDAR with image, radar, semantic, or other sensor modalities.
name: Multimodal

description: Learned global descriptors whose main encoder operates on points or point neighborhoods.
name: Raw Point / Point Network

description: Learned global descriptors based primarily on range, spherical, BEV, or other 2D projections.
name: Projection

description: Methods whose primary retrieval unit is a local keypoint, patch, neighborhood, or local geometric feature extracted from LiDAR data.
exclude: single descriptor for an entire scan
name: Local Descriptor

description: Local descriptors defined by deterministic geometric or signal-processing rules without learned parameters.
exclude: features learned from labelled or self-supervised data
name: Handcrafted

description: Handcrafted local descriptors computed from spherical-view, BEV, range-image, or other 2D projections.
name: 2D Projection Local

description: Handcrafted local descriptors operating directly on 3D neighborhoods.
name: 3D Local

description: Local LiDAR descriptors whose representation or matching function is learned from data.
exclude: global pooling as the primary descriptor
name: Learning

description: Methods that explicitly match a query scan or submap against a persistent map representation and produce place or global-localization hypotheses.
exclude: map used only as storage for single-scan descriptors
name: Map

description: Map-based recognition or global localization using handcrafted map features, grids, meshes, probabilities, or registration rules.
name: Handcrafted

description: Map-based recognition or global localization using learned map, node, intensity, point-cloud, or cross-source representations.
exclude: scan-only retrieval with no explicit map representation
name: Learning

description: LPR methods centered on a distinct research dimension not adequately represented by the stable categories above.
exclude: method that fits an existing category but uses an unusual backbone
name: Other Methods

description: Recognition between substantially different sensing viewpoints, platforms, map sources, or domains.
exclude: ordinary seasonal domain shift within the same sensor setup
name: Cross-source / Cross-domain

description: Methods whose main contribution is lifelong adaptation, novelty handling, calibrated uncertainty, or memory management for place recognition.
exclude: ordinary retrieval confidence used only as a threshold
name: Lifelong / Uncertainty

description: Methods that partition a scan or map into object-like or geometric segments and recognize places through segment descriptors or relations.
exclude: global scan descriptor without segment identities
name: Segments

description: Segment-based recognition using handcrafted segment descriptors, matching, or structural similarity.
name: Handcrafted

description: Segment-based recognition using learned descriptors, classifiers, or similarity models.
exclude: semantic object graph without segment retrieval
name: Learning

description: Methods where semantic classes, objects, or semantic relations are a primary source of place-recognition evidence.
exclude: semantic labels used only for visualization or filtering
name: Semantics

description: Semantic place recognition using graphs of objects, classes, segments, or relations.
exclude: flat semantic histogram without graph relations
name: Graph-based

description: Semantic place recognition using semantic descriptors or embeddings without an explicit relational graph.
name: Graph-free

description: Methods that use ordered scan sequences, submap trajectories, or odometry-linked temporal context for place recognition.
name: Trajectory

description: Trajectory or sequence recognition based on deterministic distance, overlap, registration, or temporal rules.
name: Handcrafted

description: Trajectory or sequence recognition using learned temporal, recurrent, or attention-based models.
name: Learning
